posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I would like to use more group feature organize items and try to ge workflow all in one board possible, but in case I use more thatn one group, it demand search action or scrolling action to find the item needed…this is not a smoothly process. I would like to suggest to put groups name on top place or header, we just click on that group link button to bring on screen the related group items.

Missions to do 2022-10-03 09-00-121545×181 23 KB

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to use one group for one student items, by now we have 17 students and it already causing pain to scrolling to find the group… and we are waiting for more students…
